title: QueueStateCalibration
description: Shape of a queue-position research record for one passive order (blueprint SS5.6 queue-state model). Because exchange data may not identify individual queue priority, estimates must include lower and upper bounds, assumptions, and a versioned calibration method.

queue_position_lower_bound.description: Lower bound of the bounded queue-position percentile interval.

queue_position_upper_bound.description: Upper bound of the bounded queue-position percentile interval. Must be >= queue_position_lower_bound (enforced by application logic; not expressible in this schema).

queue_completion_ratio.description: QCR = estimated volume consumed ahead / displayed size ahead at entry.

fill_probability_conditional.description: Fill probability conditional on queue state, market archetype, and time to close.
